"[8] ^SIGALERT UPDATE IN SYLMAR: EB I-210 EAST OF ROXFORD ST. THE #1 and #2 LANES ARE NOW OPEN. #3 LANES WILL REMAIN CLOSED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE., DUE TO A TRAFFIC CRASH. REF LOG: 0167"

"[6] ^SIGALERT UPDATE IN WESTCHESTER: NB I-405 AT HOWARD HUGHES PARKWAY. ALL NORTHBOUND LANES WILL REMAIN CLOSED FOR APPROXIMATELY 6-8 HOURS. THE SEPULVEDA BLVD ON-RAMP, HOWARD HUGHES PKWY ON-RAMP, AND THE LA TIJERA BLVD ON-RAMP WILL ALSO BE CLOSED. ALL TRAFFIC WILL BE DIVERTED OFF AT HOWARD HUGHES PARKWAY, DUE TO POLICE ACTIVITY. REF LOG: 289"
